utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully detailed: property includes type, address, features, price, fees, and taxes; financing includes method, values, and terms; legal_services includes detailed cost components; moving_services includes provider, services, and cost; setup_services includes service breakdown and total cost; total_budget includes a detailed cost breakdown. All required items are present and fully specified.
